bonn_dynamic.title: Bonn RGB-D Dynamic Dataset
bonn_dynamic.license_note: Official page requests citation; prepared media remains external to Git.

tartanair_v2.title: TartanAir V2
tartanair_v2.license_note: Dataset CC BY 4.0; prepared media remains external to keep the repository small.

mpi_sintel_stereo.title: MPI Sintel Stereo Training Dataset
mpi_sintel_stereo.citation: Butler et al., A Naturalistic Open Source Movie for Optical Flow Evaluation, ECCV 2012
mpi_sintel_stereo.license_note: Official research dataset derived from the open Sintel film; prepared media remains external to Git.

spring_stereo.title: Spring Stereo Test Dataset
spring_stereo.citation: Mehl et al., Spring: A High-Resolution High-Detail Dataset and Benchmark for Scene Flow, Optical Flow and Stereo, CVPR 2023
spring_stereo.license_note: Dataset and Spring movie assets are CC BY 4.0; prepared media remains external to Git.

virtual_kitti_2.title: Virtual KITTI 2
virtual_kitti_2.license_note: CC BY-NC-SA 3.0, non-commercial only; prepared media remains external to Git.

bonn_person_walk.name: bonn-person-walk
bonn_person_walk.description: Real registered RGB-D person tracking with body motion and self-occlusion.

bonn_person_close.name: bonn-person-close
bonn_person_close.description: Real RGB-D close pass beside robots, emphasizing silhouette and object occlusion.

tartanair_house_easy.name: tartanair-house-easy
tartanair_house_easy.description: Synthetic attic/bed transition with exact metric depth and optical flow.

tartanair_house_motion.name: tartanair-house-motion
tartanair_house_motion.description: Synthetic indoor/outdoor camera rotation with exact metric depth and optical flow.

sintel_ambush.name: sintel-ambush
sintel_ambush.description: Cinematic non-rigid action, layered silhouettes and rapid motion.

sintel_market.name: sintel-market
sintel_market.description: Cinematic market scene with people, clutter and depth layering.

spring_skeleton_cave.name: spring-skeleton-cave
spring_skeleton_cave.description: Cinematic cave scene with a moving character, skeletal foreground structure, volumetric light and deep layering.
spring_skeleton_cave.source_artifacts: The source contains strong volumetric haze, bright skeletal highlights and depth-of-field softness; compare the original before attributing these edges to the stereo warp.

spring_character_close.name: spring-character-close
spring_character_close.description: Bright character close-up with facial features, hair, a thin wooden prop and strong foreground separation.
spring_character_close.source_artifacts: The rendered source intentionally uses shallow depth of field around the character and prop; naturally blurred edges must not be counted as warp blur.

spring_daylight_path.name: spring-daylight-path
spring_daylight_path.description: Bright outdoor ground plane with rocks, vegetation, long depth range and moving camera parallax.
spring_daylight_path.source_artifacts: The source includes baked sun bloom and fine high-contrast gravel texture; the original frame is required when reviewing halo and stretch evidence.

spring_forest_seeds.name: spring-forest-seeds
spring_forest_seeds.description: Cinematic forest shot with thin airborne structures, defocus, transparency-like edges and strong depth layering.
spring_forest_seeds.source_artifacts: The source deliberately contains heavy depth-of-field blur and translucent motion-softened seed edges; these are baked into both rendered views.

vkitti_drive_clone.name: vkitti-drive-clone
vkitti_drive_clone.description: Outdoor urban driving with cars, vegetation and exact metric depth.

vkitti_drive_rain.name: vkitti-drive-rain
vkitti_drive_rain.description: Rainy outdoor driving with low contrast, traffic and exact metric depth.

davis_2017.reason: Real-world people, animals and object motion without depth ground truth.
